assumptions: fixed batch composition or known prevalence/model for the tested workload
normal approximation to a Poisson-binomial output-count statistic
description: one-sided output-count test at fixed honest false-reject rate
limitations: no source-token, freshness, or price-row binding
limited power for small batches or small epsilon gaps

rows.limitation: batch-level output test; no execution identity, freshness, source-token, or price-row binding
rows.test_statistic: number of output ones
rows.variance_model: fixed-composition Poisson-binomial normal approximation

rows.limitation: batch-level output test; assumes known model/prevalence; no admission binding
rows.test_statistic: total one bits in OUE vectors
rows.variance_model: sum of one true-coordinate Bernoulli and d-1 false-coordinate Bernoulli variances
